signals.npcLine: Markets churn restless, undercurrents rippling with shadow trades.
signals.questPulse: Cryptocurrencies spike; watch asteroids orbiting volatile sectors.
signals.worldFeed: Global caps flicker, fear tinges the cyber bazaars.
signals.clueEvent: Digital storms brew as new tokens rise from cyberdust.

signals.npcLine: Rave signals detected—nodes pulsing with encrypted chatter.
signals.questPulse: RAVE node surges, prime target for stealth acquisition.
signals.worldFeed: Data spikes echo from underground RAVE networks.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted packets hint at upward momentum in RAVE circuits.

signals.npcLine: Wojak shadows loom—data streams show rising tension.
signals.questPulse: Wojak nodes exhibit unusual activity; possible pump detected.
signals.worldFeed: Fear drives traders to flee or fuel risky bets.
signals.clueEvent: Subtle spikes suggest weak hands unloading Wojak tokens.

signals.npcLine: Pengu flickers on neon grids—chance to collect.
signals.questPulse: Pengu's quiet ascent could hide an opportunity.
signals.worldFeed: Cryptic signals breathe life into the forgotten markets.
signals.clueEvent: Low profile but rising interest in Pengu circuits.

signals.npcLine: AAVE silent in the shrouds; still waters run deep.
signals.questPulse: AAVE’s stillness masks potential upheaval beneath the surface.
signals.worldFeed: Traders eye silent giants with cautious dread.
signals.clueEvent: Flat activity on AAVE may precede sudden moves.
